title: stachys costaricensis
intro: Stachys costaricensis, also known as Costa Rican betony, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Stachys costaricensis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues such as bloating and cramps. Stachys costaricensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
